mapper.insert:
insert into fr_annotation ( area, perimeter, category_id, description, location_type, annotation_type,
contour40000,
create_by, update_by, slide_id, id, contour_type, single_slide_id, single, create_time, update_time )values( #{area}, #{perimeter}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{locationType}, #{annotationType},
st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),
#{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{slideId}, #{id}, #{contourType}, #{singleSlideId}, #{single}, now(), now() )
mapper.update:
update fr_annotation
category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, location_type = #{locationType}, annotation_type = #{annotationType}, update_by = #{updateBy},
contour40000 = st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),
id = #{id}, update_time = now()
where annotation_id = #{annotationId}
mapper.select: SELECT n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables where schemaname = 'public' and relname = 'fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
select count(*) from pg_class where relname = 'fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
select ST_LengthSpheroid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}), 'SPHEROID["WGS 84",6378137,298.257223563]') as perimeter, ST_Area(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as area
SELECT sum(ST_Area(contour40000)) AS area from fr_annotation where single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId} and contour_type = 3
mapper.insert:
insert into fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber} ( area, perimeter, category_id , contour40000, contour625, contour2500, contour10000, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, slide_id, single_slide_id, id ) values
( #{item.area}, #{item.perimeter}, #{item.categoryId}, st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour40000}), st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour625}), st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour2500}), st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour10000}), #{item.locationType}, #{item.annotationType}, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), #{item.slideId}, #{item.singleSlideId}, #{item.id} )
mapper.select: select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, id, contour_type, single_slide_id, single, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour40000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour10000) AS contour10000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour2500) AS contour2500, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour625) AS contour625 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}

select.if: select ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Union((select contour40000 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}),st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as contour
select ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Difference((select contour40000 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}),st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as contour

mapper.select: SELECT category_id FROM fr_annotation WHERE slide_id = #{slideId} AND category_id != 0 GROUP BY category_id
select t.category_id, count(1) total_count from fr_annotation t where t.slide_id = #{slideId} and t.contour_type = 2 GROUP BY t.category_id

SELECT annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, project_id, slide_id, id
FROM fr_annotation WHERE slide_id in
#{item}
and contour_type = 2
SELECT st_asgeojson(ST_Collect(contour40000)) as collectContour FROM fr_annotation WHERE single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId} AND contour_type = 3
